2026-03-27DNDVisiting Forces ActProclamation to designate the Republic of the Philippines as a "designated state"Order directing that a proclamation be issued in order to designate the Republic of the Philippines as a "designated state" for the purposes of the Visiting Forces Act.N/A
subject: Proclamation to designate the Republic of the Philippines as a "designated state"
precis: Order directing that a proclamation be issued in order to designate the Republic of the Philippines as a "designated state" for the purposes of the Visiting Forces Act.
